testcase.name: SC01-T05 · P04 Save to Wrongbook › AC1+AC2: happy path — tap save → loading → SAVED → navigate to /wrongbook
SC01-T05 · P04 Save to Wrongbook › AC5: save failure — 5xx → toast + stay on P04
SC01-T05 · P04 Save to Wrongbook › AC4: idempotent save — 2nd tap same qid returns snapshot
SC01-T05 · P04 Save to Wrongbook › low confidence path — save requires confirm modal (TC-01.04)
